userMessage:
I’d only add two reliability steps if missing:

ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence
ACQuire:STATE RUN

warnings: Detected over-concatenated SCPI command strings; split into grouped steps (max 3 per step).

response.text:

actionsJson.summary: Insert acquisition reliability steps ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence and ACQuire:STATE RUN into the existing CH2 50 ns pulse-width glitch trigger flow.
findings: The current flow already configures the CH2 pulse-width trigger and enables FastAcq, but it does not include ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence and ACQuire:STATE RUN.
suggestedFixes: Set ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence prior to starting acquisition.
Set ACQuire:STATE RUN to begin the acquisition sequence.
Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Long semicolon command chains were split and grouped for readability (max 3 commands per step).
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "MSO6B" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: CH2 50 ns Glitch Trigger Setup
flow.description: Configures a pulse-width trigger on CH2 for intermittent glitches around 50 ns using a 40 ns to 60 ns window, enables FastAcq, and starts acquisition reliably.
